title: lithocarpus dealbatus
intro: Lithocarpus dealbatus, also known as the white-barked Lithocarpus or Litocarpus dealbatus, is a species of evergreen tree native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Lithocarpus dealbatus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus dealbatus is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
